Bug,SODP-14099,1135283,MyTelus Overview API is not returning the Optik 5.0,High,🟠 High,,EOG_E2E_GTM,,,"Unable to see Optik TV details on the Overview page.

So to clarify further: {{/product/fifaProductInventoryManagement/v2/product}} is returning the product, but {{/customer/customerinfo/v2/summaries?wirelinecustomerlist}} is not. Hence why it's not included as a product in the resulting overview-api response.

Experience Defect,GREEN-627,1111336,Creating an Entertainment quote with STB does not automatically add Pro-Install to the quote,High,,🟠 High,EOG_E2E_GTM,,,"Based on this conversation in gchat, I am expecting that when I build a quote with Entertainment plan {{2aa83ce6-bc80-421c-a327-1634f4e217e0}} and Set Top Box {{41a7d4a3-3be3-4995-b616-af3da2f68626}} that Pro Install {{c08a7445-f012-48e2-83e5-357818e5d19d}} will automatically be added to the quote. This is not happening in itn01 with the following payload to the TMF Quote api.

I also tried with no {{transaction-family}} extended parameters or {{target}} values and got the same behaviour. Please let us know if we should be using different {{transaction-family}} extended parameters or {{target}}.
Pro Install {{c08a7445-f012-48e2-83e5-357818e5d19d}} should be automatically be added to the quote when Entertainment plan and STB is added
Actual result: Pro Install {{c08a7445-f012-48e2-83e5-357818e5d19d}} is not added to the quote",,,Netcracker Cloud BSS Order Management,,Staging
